title: Fuel Consumption Calculator - MPG & L/100km
description: Free fuel consumption calculator. Calculate your vehicle's fuel efficiency in MPG or L/100km. Track fuel costs and compare vehicle economy.
keywords: fuel consumption calculator, MPG calculator, gas mileage calculator, fuel efficiency, L/100km calculator
intro: Calculate your vehicle's fuel consumption and cost per trip. Enter distance traveled and fuel used.

faq.a: Fuel consumption (L/100km) = (Fuel used in liters / Distance in km) × 100. MPG = Distance in miles / Gallons used.
For cars: under 6 L/100km (over 40 MPG) is excellent, 6-8 L/100km (30-40 MPG) is good, over 10 L/100km (under 24 MPG) is poor.

faq.q: How to convert MPG to L/100km?
